vue-directives.name: katex
vue-directives.description: Renders a LaTeX/AsciiMath expression using KaTeX.

modifiers.name: auto
modifiers.description: Parses mixed text/math content via KaTeX auto-render (delimiters \( \) and \[ \]).

modifiers.name: clear
modifiers.description: Skips adding the `katex-container` wrapper class.

modifiers.name: boxed
modifiers.description: Adds the `katex-boxed` class (framed box).

modifiers.name: lg
modifiers.description: Adds the `katex-boxed-lg` class (large framed box).

modifiers.name: left
modifiers.description: Adds the `katex-left` class (left-aligned).

modifiers.name: right
modifiers.description: Adds the `katex-right` class (right-aligned).

modifiers.name: nomargin
modifiers.description: Adds `katex-m-0` (removes margin).

modifiers.name: dense
modifiers.description: Adds `katex-m-1` (reduced margin).

modifiers.name: ascii
modifiers.description: Converts AsciiMath to TeX before rendering.

modifiers.name: inline
modifiers.description: Forces inline display mode (overrides block detection).

modifiers.name: display
modifiers.description: Prepends \displaystyle to the expression.

modifiers.name: output
modifiers.description: Shows the raw TeX source below the rendered output.

vue-directives.name: theme
vue-directives.description: Applies theme-based Tailwind CSS classes to the element.

modifiers.name: bg
modifiers.description: Applies the theme background color class.

modifiers.name: text
modifiers.description: Applies the theme text color class.

modifiers.name: border
modifiers.description: Applies the theme border color class (also adds `border`).

modifiers.name: outline
modifiers.description: Applies the theme outline color class (also adds `outline-2`).

modifiers.name: gradient
modifiers.description: Applies a vertical linear gradient using the theme colors.

modifiers.name: from
modifiers.description: Sets the gradient `from-*` color stop.

modifiers.name: to
modifiers.description: Sets the gradient `to-*` color stop.

modifiers.name: admin
modifiers.description: Applies admin styling (equivalent to .bg + .text with admin theme).

modifiers.name: light
modifiers.description: Uses the light intensity variant of the theme color.

modifiers.name: dark
modifiers.description: Uses the dark intensity variant of the theme color.

vue-directives.name: admin
vue-directives.description: Shows the element only if the current user has admin rights. Accepts an optional boolean binding to toggle visibility.
